title: Build a Real-World Multi-Agent AI App with MCP + LangGraph | Part 2
summary: Tutorial on building a multi-agent travel planning system using LangGraph and Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers. Covers integration of real-time flight and weather data, long-term memory with PostgreSQL, and deployment via Streamlit.
writeup: Part 2 of a tutorial that builds a multi-agent travel planning system by wiring LangGraph together with MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers for real-time flight and weather data. The build integrates PostgreSQL for long-term memory, Tavily search, external APIs, and a Streamlit front end into a complete agentic setup. It shows how the pieces connect: LangGraph orchestrating agents, MCP servers exposing live data, and persistent memory backing the workflow.
